maintenanceNote: When releasing app changes, bump APP_VERSION in src/version.ts, APP_VERSION in sw.js and public/sw.js, plus this version value and the public version.json so Settings, service worker caches, and update checks stay in sync.
notes: Reset Cards and Stats on tab re-tap.
Reset Track and Journal on tab re-tap.
Cleaned up Meal Card branding.
Pill toggles now switch from either side.
Improved Food Log modal focus behavior, zero-value display, and Calories & Macros layout.
Allowed completed-day entries to repeat into today while keeping completed days read-only.
Made Stats mode-aware for cutting, bulking, and maintaining, with open days excluded from scores and banking.
Aligned Last 7 days graph reference lines and completed-day coloring with the active goal mode.
Unified macro chips through a reusable component across Track, Library, Journal, and Cards.
Migrated the app to React, Vite, and TypeScript while preserving existing local data.
Restored polished centered popup modals and improved iOS/PWA safe-area behavior.
Rebuilt Stats, Journal, Food Log, quick picks, and meal cards for closer feature parity.
Added kCal/kJ display and entry support while keeping saved calories normalized.
Updated the app icon, Cards tab icon, and 2.0.0.0 offline update cache.
Recovery release: forces a fresh 2.0.0.1 app shell for installed PWAs.
Applied shared modal safe-area handling to Meal Card and Meal Photo sheets
Adjusted iOS PWA modal safe-area spacing so bottom sheets sit flush to the bottom
Removed sticky modal headers so modal content scrolls as one sheet
Added kCal and kJ display support while keeping saved calorie data normalized to kCal
Added kCal and kJ entry options in the Log Food modal
Improved safe-area spacing for modal sheets on iPhone-style screens
Refined Photo Journal day view with List and Collage modes
Added Collage labels toggle and shuffle control
Cleaned up Library Cards rows and empty meal photo placeholders
Improved meal card preview spacing so long food names do not collide with calorie values
Simplified meal card export actions to a single Save / Share PNG button
Unified meal card titles and labels across both card formats
Added serving portion support for food entries
Fixed journal calendar photo counts so day boxes stay fixed height
Clarified per-serving food logging UI and portion badges
Grouped food log calories and macros into one per-serving panel
Unified Additional Information spacing and fixed macro input focus
Added a read-only live logged-total preview for serving portions
Updated Settings color palettes to softer pastels
